CheckTitle: Security group restricts Cassandra access from the internet
Description: Checks that Cassandra TCP ports 7199, 9160, and 8888 are not exposed to unrestricted IPv4 (`0.0.0.0/0`) or IPv6 (`::/0`) sources.
Risk: Public Cassandra management and client access enables unauthorized administration, credential attacks, and data compromise.

Code.Other: Inspect inbound rules in the ECS console. Locate effective Accept rules from `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0` using TCP or ALL whose actual port range contains Cassandra ports `7199`, `9160`, or `8888`. Restrict the source or range, or revoke the exact rule by SecurityGroupRuleId. Revocation using protocol/range/source must exactly match the existing rule.

Recommendation.Text: Do not expose TCP ports 7199, 9160, or 8888 to `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0`.
